name: American National Group Inc.
summary: PART I Introduction American National Group Inc., together with its subsidiaries (collectively, ANGI, we, our, us, or the Company), is focused on being a source of certainty for individuals and institutions through a range of insurance and retirement services. Our business is presently conducted through our subsidiaries under two operating segments, which we refer to as our Annuities and Life Insurance segments. We conduct our business in 50 states, the District of Columbia, Bermuda, Guam, and P...
